title.en: Establish and Maintain a Service Provider Management Policy

prose.en: Establish and maintain a service provider management policy. Ensure the policy addresses the classification, inventory, assessment, monitoring, and decommissioning of service providers. Review and update the policy annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
A service provider management policy is established and maintained.
The policy addresses the classification, inventory, assessment, monitoring, and decommissioning of service providers.
The policy is reviewed and updated annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
